name: smartwriter-mcp-chrome
description: Smartwriter MCP Chrome Extension - Bridge between MCP server and Chrome for DOM automation

scripts.build: pnpm run build:css && NODE_ENV=production tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.tsx --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --minify --replaceNodeEnv && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/icon-on.png dist/icon-on.png && cp src/icon-off.png dist/icon-off.png
scripts.build:dev: pnpm run build:css:dev && NODE_ENV=development tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.tsx --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --sourcemap --replaceNodeEnv && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/icon-on.png dist/icon-on.png && cp src/icon-off.png dist/icon-off.png
scripts.watch: NODE_ENV=development tsup src/background.ts src/content.ts src/popup.tsx --format iife --splitting false --target es2022 --outDir dist --sourcemap --replaceNodeEnv --watch --onSuccess "pnpm run build:css:dev && mv dist/background.global.js dist/background.js && mv dist/content.global.js dist/content.js && mv dist/popup.global.js dist/popup.js && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/icon-on.png dist/icon-on.png && cp src/icon-off.png dist/icon-off.png"
